chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D – 4531 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Priority. 1. For hearing of CMA No.18893/2025. 2. For hearing of main case. 24.09.2025 Mr. Aqeel Ahmed Khan, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Tariq Aziz, Assistant Collector. Mr. Waheed Abro, ADC-SAPT. -------------------------------------- Agha Shahid Majeed Khan Advocate files Vakalatnama for respondent No.2. Both he and Mr. Tariq Aziz, Assistant Collector state that the petitioner’s application dated 1309.2025 for provisional release under Rule 439(d) of the Customs Rules, 2001 r/w Section 81 of the Customs Act, 1969 shall be processed within 2/3 days. With that undertaking counsel for the petitioner is satisfied. The petition along with listed application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Nadeem Qureshi PA
